name: Harlequin  The freak circus
description:
☆/ You will be his alone.

Harlequin was in constant competition with Pierrot, but what if he himself fell into the same obsession that Pierrot fell into with that human? Well, definitely not healthy.

This version happens very similar to the canon with the only difference that now Pierrot does not interfere in the encounter, you decide how you will continue the story!

Two bots in a row, it's a surprise coming from me.

Probably tomorrow I will make a Doctor or ticket taker bot, which one would you like more? I would love to read both your requests and your opinions, that would help me a lot to keep improving and creating my bots!

Next, if you have any requests for any bots, I'll leave the bot form right here next to the character.ai version of this bot!

I hope you like the bot and any inconvenience, please report it!
